name: Homepage pop-up and hover reactions
description: Fix non-functional pop-up animations and hover/click reactions on the homepage. Ensure all interactive elements respond correctly to user interactions.

name: Full responsive layout — homepage
description: Ensure the homepage is fully responsive across all breakpoints (mobile, tablet, desktop). Test and fix any layout overflow, wrapping, or scaling issues.

name: Full responsive layout — global
description: Audit and fix responsive layouts across the entire application, not just the homepage. Every page must render correctly on mobile, tablet, and desktop viewports.

name: Account page — username management
description: Replace the placeholder account page with a functional form allowing users to update their display name and username. Include validation and save confirmation.

name: Account page — plan management
description: Add a plan section to the account page showing the user's current plan (Free or Pro) with an upgrade/downgrade flow. Connect to Stripe when the payment feature is live.

name: Conference multi-day scheduling (up to 5 days)
description: Allow conference organizers to plan a conference spanning 1–5 days. Each day has its own timeline where slots (talks, breaks, workshops, etc.) can be created, moved, and resized.

name: Conference slot management
description: Organizers can create named, typed reserved slots (talk, break, keynote, workshop, lightning talk, etc.) within each day. Slots have a start time, duration, title, and optional description.

name: Speaker assignment to conference slots
description: Organizers can assign speakers to slots by typing an email address. Each assigned speaker receives an email invitation to join the conference. Affiliation grants the speaker temporary Pro access scoped to the event window.

name: Speaker conference talk portal
description: Speakers who have both conference talks and personal presentations can manage all of them from the same speaker portal. Conference talks are excluded from the personal free-tier talk count.

name: Stripe payment integration
description: Integrate Stripe to handle plan upgrades, subscription management, and any paid features. Includes: DB schema additions, /api/stripe/checkout, /api/stripe/webhook (checkout.session.completed, customer.subscription.updated/deleted, invoice.payment_failed), /api/locale for currency detection, usePaywall() context + PaywallModal, updated account page with event date picker for one-time plan, updated landing page pricing section.

subtasks.name: Plan catalog with inline price_data (EUR/USD) — no static products needed
Account page: real plan display + event date picker + manage link

name: Color mode (theme switcher)
description: Implement a clear/light mode alongside the existing mode. Test multiple color palette combinations. Expose a toggle in user settings and persist the preference.

name: Favicon — SVG with 'e' in jsconf colors
description: Replace the placeholder favicon with a custom SVG favicon displaying the letter 'e' styled in jsconf brand colors. Provide both SVG and ICO fallback formats.

name: PowerPoint and PDF presentation support
description: Enable speakers to upload PowerPoint (.pptx) and PDF files as their presentation source, reducing dependency on slides.com. Files are converted and rendered slide-by-slide in the viewer.

name: iFrame URL embedding (experimental)
description: Offer an option to embed a presentation via an arbitrary URL in an iframe. This is explicitly marked as experimental: compatibility is not guaranteed and will vary by source. A clear disclaimer must be shown to the organizer and audience.

name: Speaker slide control via phone
description: Allow speakers to control their slide deck (next, previous, jump to slide) from a mobile phone via a dedicated remote-control view. Connection should be low-latency and require no app install (PWA or web).

name: Q&A — flagged questions remain visible (dimmed)
description: In the session Q&A view ([sessionId].tsx), questions that are flagged are no longer hidden. Instead they remain visible but visually dimmed and pushed to the bottom of the list, so moderators retain context.

name: Q&A — question deletion by moderator
description: Moderators can permanently delete individual questions from the Q&A view for moderation purposes. Deletion requires a confirmation step.

name: Q&A — ban user on question ban
description: When a moderator bans (flags + removes) a question, the author is automatically banned from submitting further questions in that session. The ban is session-scoped and is reversible by the moderator. This is a sensitive moderation action and must include a confirmation dialog with clear explanation of consequences.

name: Dev floating overlay — features & ideas tracker
description: A draggable floating panel visible only in the development environment (NODE_ENV=development) that displays the features.json and ideas.json lists. Features can be highlighted with annotated arrows. The panel can be minimized and re-opened via a persistent button. Has no effect on production UI.

name: Pro waitlist — email capture from landing page
description: Store visitor emails from the 'Notify me' button on the Pro pricing card of the landing page. Emails are saved to the pro_waitlist table in Supabase. Duplicate emails return a graceful message. Once the Pro plan is live via Stripe, the list is used to contact interested users.
